# Overview EBA Q&A 2020_5301 – states that a specific cell will be opened in the future. Meanwhile, as an interim solution a different cell will be used – what will be the basis for FinRep transformation rules? The current interim solution or the future solution?
### Contact person @Arjan.Bos @andreamerz
### Background information
### Points/Questions to resolve
### Related issues #482 #483 ### Before closing checklist - [ ] Assignee for review - [ ] Assignee to close - [ ] Other actions
